Video.summary: Richard Pryor describes his transforming time in Zimbabwe, quitting drugs and booze. Plus Bette Davis appears.
Video.title: The Best Of Richard Pryor (2/9/83)

Image.alt: The Best Of Richard Pryor (2/9/83)
The Best Of Richard Pryor (2/9/83)
